description: Official Claude Code plugin marketplace by Surendran E — curated plugins for test automation, web performance, and AI-assisted engineering.

plugins.name: bdd-test-executor
plugins.description: Parse and execute BDD Gherkin feature files against web applications using Playwright MCP. Captures full stack traces, console errors, and screenshots on failure. Generates a self-contained interactive HTML dashboard.

plugins.name: end-user-perf
plugins.description: Plugin to evaluate and report end user performance of web applications using Google Lighthouse. Covers Web Core Vitals, network analysis, and optimization opportunities.

plugins.name: api-test-runner
plugins.description: Execute API test cases from Swagger / OpenAPI specs using Playwright. Auto-acquires bearer tokens, loads parameters from files, and streams results to a live dashboard with charts, stack traces, and PDF export.
